Container.Name: Vellichor-ARC
Container.Overview: Intel Arc edition of Vellichor — a self-hosted web app that turns your written stories and ebooks into narrated audiobooks. Uses the Kokoro-82M TTS model accelerated on your Intel Arc GPU via OpenVINO + IPEX. Multi-voice character casting, background ambience, chaptered M4B + per-chapter MP3 output, and auto-export to an Audiobookshelf library. Requires Unraid 7.0+ with the Intel GPU Top plugin. Optional AI "Smart cast" needs a separate Ollama container (uses Vulkan backend on Arc) — set Ollama URL below; without it the rule-based Quick detect is used.
Container.Description: Turn stories & ebooks into narrated audiobooks with Kokoro-82M TTS. Intel Arc GPU acceleration via OpenVINO/IPEX. Multi-voice casting, ambience, M4B/MP3, Audiobookshelf export.

Config.Name: App data (/data)
Config.Description: Uploads, job history, and the model cache (Kokoro + Chatterbox). Persisted.

Config.Name: Audiobook library (/library)
Config.Description: Optional. Where finished audiobooks are exported, e.g. your Audiobookshelf library share. Leave blank if unused.

Config.Name: Login password
Config.Description: Web UI login password. LEAVE BLANK ONLY ON A TRUSTED LAN — blank disables authentication entirely.

Config.Name: Secret key
Config.Description: Session-cookie signing key. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32. Blank = a random key each restart (everyone gets logged out on restart).

Config.Name: GPU backend
Config.Description: GPU backend. Set to 'openvino' for Intel Arc/iGPU, or 'cpu' to skip GPU acceleration.

Config.Name: Ollama URL (AI Smart cast)
Config.Description: Optional. URL of a separate Ollama container for AI Smart cast, e.g. http://192.168.1.50:11434. Set up an Ollama container with --device=/dev/dri to use Vulkan on your Arc card.

Config.Name: Smart cast model
Config.Description: Ollama model used for Smart cast (must be pulled in your Ollama container).

Config.Name: Completion notify URL
Config.Description: Optional ntfy/gotify URL to get a push when a conversion finishes.

Config.Name: Export owner UID
Config.Description: UID to own exported audiobook files so your library app can read them (Unraid 'nobody' = 99).
